creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
brooks      2007-12-28 22:11:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/tftp-hpa         Makefile 
  Added files:
    ftp/tftp-hpa/files   patch-tftpd_tftpd.c 
  Log:
  When call tzset() before openlog so we log in local time instead of UTC.
  This matches the behavior of /usr/libexec/tftpd.
  
  Submitted by:   Hiroshi Fujishima <hirobo at tonteki dot org>
  PR:             ports/116455
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +1 -0      ports/ftp/tftp-hpa/Makefile
  1.3       +15 -0     ports/ftp/tftp-hpa/files/patch-tftpd_tftpd.c (new)
